overview.text: Property NSW is the NSW Government's property-management entity. It manages a large portfolio of owned and leased commercial buildings, oversees major precincts (e.g. Darling Harbour, The Rocks, Sydney Olympic Park as Place Management NSW) and provides facilities-management services to other agencies.

items: Owned office portfolio in Sydney CBD and major regional centres.
Heritage and place-management at iconic precincts.
Security and operations talkgroups support 24/7 site management.
